---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Colonel's Restaurant kitchen help year 2024

2.  Copita Restaurant busser year 2024

3.  Divers Delight Diver year 2023

## Internships

1.  TUSAŞ Continuous Improvement Intern. year 2025

# Projects

Graduation project at ESPOM.

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

Reading booka and playing video games about fantasy worlds such as warhammer 40k . Swimming, taking a walk at the park, div
